text.message: I have been sharing the wealth
I like the 6 ore block too
I feel like I'm going to get third for sure
I know I have a city. But blue will get army and you'll keep road
And in the meantime I'm getting robbed every turn
gotta spread it, u guys are close to eachother
6s and 9s were a good choice. Blacks game for sure
Hare having weak position but getting robbed all mid game
Bad for me. 4 of those were mine
Well. I didn't read that in time
Robbing me and not blocking the 6 brick. Fatal errors
